channel.title: EMRG — Ecommerce Performance Journal
channel.description: Insights, strategies, and technical guides for scaling DTC commerce engines.

item.title: Digital Marketing in Latin America: Why Companies Waste Budget and How to Fix It
item.description: Digital marketing investment in Latin America is growing fast — but many companies still struggle to generate predictable ROI. The issue isn’t budget size, but strategy, tracking, and performance optimization.

item.title: Why Customer Acquisition Costs Are Rising in Latin America
item.description: Customer acquisition costs (CAC) are increasing across Latin America due to competition, tracking limitations, and inefficient funnels. Here’s how companies can reduce CAC and scale sustainably.
